depends_on.name: element_id
depends_on.documentation: The document ID of the neuron element this residuals analysis is associated with.

depends_on.name: vmspikefit_id
depends_on.documentation: The document ID of the Vm-spike fit this residual analysis was computed from.

fields.documentation: The mean residual of the Vm-to-firing-rate fit.
